use serde::Deserialize;

// BAD: #[serde(default)] on required-looking fields
#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct DatabaseConfig {
    host: String,
    #[serde(default)]
    port: u16,
    #[serde(default)]
    username: String,
    #[serde(default)]
    password: String,
    #[serde(default)]
    database_name: String,
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct AuthConfig {
    #[serde(default)]
    secret_key: String,
    #[serde(default)]
    token_expiry: u64,
    #[serde(default)]
    issuer: String,
}
